SEARCH
Package com.mycompany.model

Class CircuitElement

java.lang.Object
com.mycompany.model.CircuitElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
Component, ConnectionNode
public abstract class CircuitElement extends Object
Base abstraction for elements that can provide impedance and a short description. Implementations include primitive components (Resistor, Capacitor, Inductor) and composite connection nodes (series/parallel groups).
Version:
1.1
Author:
Kamil Fulneczek

  • Constructor Summary

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    CircuitElement()
    Protected no-arg constructor.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract String
    description()
    Return a short human-readable description of this element suitable for display, for example "R(100)" or "series(R(100), C(1e-6))".
    abstract Complex
    getImpedance(double frequencyHz)
    Compute impedance of this element at the given frequency.

  • Constructor Details

    • CircuitElement

      protected CircuitElement()
      Protected no-arg constructor. Subclasses should initialize their own state via their constructors.

  • Method Details

    • getImpedance

      public abstract Complex getImpedance(double frequencyHz) throws InvalidCircuitException
      Compute impedance of this element at the given frequency.
      Parameters:
      frequencyHz - frequency in Hertz (must be > 0)
      Returns:
      impedance as a Complex
      Throws:
      InvalidCircuitException - when input is invalid for this element or computation cannot be performed

    • description

      public abstract String description()
      Return a short human-readable description of this element suitable for display, for example "R(100)" or "series(R(100), C(1e-6))".
      Returns:
      description string (never null)
